escalatedRisks.detail: DDR5 16Gb (2Gx8) session avg $41.333 (+0.40%, +$0.166). Second consecutive rebound with acceleration. 'Dip-bounce-accelerate' three-phase pattern: 5/19 decline (−0.41%) → 5/20 mild rebound (+0.16%) → 5/21 accelerating rebound (+0.40%). Broke previous high $41.267. 11-day cumulative +3.76%. Strike cancellation did NOT ease pricing — market pricing structural shortage, not strike panic. TrendForce same-day: 'DDR5 spot market strengthens on branded demand and higher bids.' $41 line upgraded from support to 'fear-of-missing-out line'.
escalatedRisks.confidence: high (11 consecutive data points, TrendForce official qualitative confirmation)

escalatedRisks.detail: Solidigm D5-P5336 61.44TB U.2 (SBFPF2BV614T001) ONLY 1 UNIT in stock for THIRD CONSECUTIVE DAY. Three days without replenishment excludes temporary shortage/logistics delay — structural channel inventory depletion CONFIRMED. Restock Sept 7 2026 (3.5 months). E1.L form factor 4 units still available. QLC in 'availability crisis' — most severe SSD supply signal since tracking began. Independent of Samsung strike — structural channel exhaustion.

escalatedRisks.status: RESOLVED — tentative deal. Union vote 5/22-28 IN PROGRESS.
escalatedRisks.source: Tom's Hardware / Korea JoongAng Daily / multiple May 20-22 2026
escalatedRisks.detail: Samsung and NSEU union reached tentative wage deal 5/20 — 10.5% operating profit bonus + NO CAP + distribution from 2027 + one-year deferral for loss-making units. Union vote started 5/22 → deadline 5/27-28. Labor Minister Kim Young-hoon played key mediation role. Production cut since 5/14 (360K wafers removed) is FACT — warm-down→ramp-up recovery needs 2-3 weeks per WCCFTech. If vote fails, strike risk returns.

escalatedRisks.risk: Micron 6550 ION TLC not QLC — QLC supply gap post-6500 ION EOL 🆕
escalatedRisks.detail: Micron 6550 ION (PCIe Gen5, max 61.44TB) confirmed using TLC NAND not QLC. Does NOT fill QLC tracking column's 30.72TB supply gap. 6500 ION EOL (last order 2026/8/25) → 30.72TB QLC supply shrinks from D5-P5316+6500 ION dual-source to D5-P5316 single source. This is a structural supply narrowing event for QLC at 30.72TB capacity.

TrendForce reports DDR4 spot activity subdued with most buyers adopting wait-and-see approach. DDR5 contrast: 'suppliers repeatedly raising quotes, buyers proactively increasing bid prices.' This divergence validates the two-tier market thesis — DDR4 for legacy refresh, DDR5 for AI/enterprise demand.

Samsung PM1743 7.68TB PCIe5 band tightened from previous $1,800-$6,000 to $2,499-$2,799. Outlier extremes (SHI $27,947, Newegg $2,195) being cleaned out of search results. Brand three-tier structure (Samsung→Kioxia→Micron) now cleaner.
escalatedRisks.confidence: medium (search-quality data, not direct page confirmation)
